data.reason: Created internal/wrapup/parse.go with ParseWrapupFile (reads .tick/wrapup.md), ParseWrapupSteps (agent-based decomposition with JSON retry), LoadCachedSteps/CacheSteps (cache in .tick/logs/wrapup-steps/). Reused WrapupStep type from step_prompt.go. Added parse_test.go with 12 tests covering valid/malformed JSON, retry, empty content, cache hit/miss, and JSON extraction.

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:34 - Task nh9 complete: Created internal/wrapup/parse.go with ParseWrapupFile, ParseWrapupSteps (agent decomposition with JSON retry on malformed response), parseStepsJSON (extracts JSON arrays even from markdown-fenced output), LoadCachedSteps/CacheSteps (cache dir: .tick/logs/wrapup-steps/<epic-id>.json). Reused WrapupStep type from step_prompt.go (task l0v) — no duplication. 12 tests in parse_test.go all passing.
data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md

data.reason: Implemented agent step execution loop in internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go with AgentStepResult, StepProgress types, WrapupRunner.RunAgentSteps method. Supports SessionAgent (single ACP session across steps) and one-shot fallback. Retry logic on missing STEP_DONE signal, ESCALATE handling, crash recovery via progress persistence in .tick/logs/wrapup-progress/. 8 tests covering all paths.
data.title: Implement agent step execution loop with ACP session support

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:37 - Task 451 complete: Created internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go with AgentStepResult (renamed from StepResult to avoid conflict with existing shell StepResult in wrapup.go), StepProgress, WrapupRunner types. RunAgentSteps supports SessionAgent (single session, Prompt per step) and one-shot fallback (Run per step). Retry on missing STEP_DONE up to MaxRetriesPerStep (default 2), ESCALATE marks step escalated and continues. Progress saved to .tick/logs/wrapup-progress/<epic-id>.json after each step for crash recovery. Test mocks prefixed with 'step' to avoid collision with parse_test.go mocks. 8 tests all passing.
data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md

data.reason: Created internal/output/ package with RunOutput struct, 3 sink interfaces (BoardSink, CloudSink, RunLogSink), 19 event methods routing to terminal+board+runlog sinks, functional options constructor, mutex-protected terminal writes, and JSONL mode. 15 tests verify sink routing, JSONL suppression, nil-safety, and terminal output.
data.title: Define RunOutput interface and core types

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:53 - Task [8l3] complete. Created internal/output/ with RunOutput struct, 3 sink interfaces (BoardSink, CloudSink, RunLogSink), functional options (WithStdout, WithStderr, WithBoard, WithCloud, WithRunLog, WithJSONL), and local IterationResult/RunResult types to avoid import cycles with engine. The RunLogSink interface methods match runlog.Logger's existing method signatures. CloudSink is defined but not yet routed in event methods — wire it when cloud sync is implemented.
data.title: Unified run output module

data.reason: Created BoardSinkAdapter (board_sink.go) wrapping *server.Server and *runrecord.Store, and RunLogSinkAdapter (runlog_sink.go) wrapping *runlog.Logger. Added public BroadcastRunStreamEvent method on Server to expose the unexported broadcastRunStreamEvent. RunLogSinkAdapter maps flat interface args to runlog's data structs (IterationEndData, RunEndData). BoardSinkAdapter uses type assertions for any-typed params. All 29 output tests pass.
data.title: Implement board and runlog sink adapters

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:56 - Task [wbq] complete. Created BoardSinkAdapter (board_sink.go) and RunLogSinkAdapter (runlog_sink.go) in internal/output/. Key decisions: (1) Added public Server.BroadcastRunStreamEvent() that delegates to the unexported broadcastRunStreamEvent — needed since the adapter lives in a different package. (2) BoardSink interface uses 'any' for status/snap params; the adapter does type assertions to *runrecord.EpicStatus and agent.AgentStateSnapshot, returning nil on wrong type (safe no-op). (3) RunLogSinkAdapter bridges the flat-arg interface (LogIterationEnd, LogRunEnd) to runlog's struct-based methods (IterationEndData, RunEndData). (4) output.go also gained terminal output for context/wave/task events and JSONL support in RunComplete — these came from hook/linter additions, not this task, but were included in the commit since they were already staged.
data.title: Unified run output module

data.reason: Implemented terminal sink formatting in all RunOutput event methods. Added human-readable output for ContextGenerating/Progress/Generated/Loaded/Skipped/Failed, TaskStarted/Completed, and RunComplete (with signal support). ContextProgress uses carriage-return overwrite with lastProgressLen tracking. RunComplete emits JSONL via json.Encoder when jsonl mode enabled, suppressing all human output. Also fixed pre-existing build error in board_sink_test.go (removed nonexistent TaskID field). All 40 tests pass.
data.title: Implement terminal sink formatting

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:57 - Task [zal] complete. Terminal formatting was already implemented in output.go by the [wbq] iteration (included in that commit). Added comprehensive test suite: 20+ new tests covering all terminal formatting (context events, task events, RunComplete human/JSONL modes, signal display, JSONL omitempty, progress line padding). Fixed board_sink_test.go build error (TaskID field removed from AgentStateSnapshot). All 40 tests pass.
data.title: Unified run output module

data.reason: Replaced all On* callback fields on Engine with single Output *output.RunOutput field. Expanded RunLogSink interface with 15 additional methods covering all engine logging needs (budget, signals, idle, agent events). Added corresponding RunOutput methods that route to appropriate sinks. Engine now has zero fmt.Printf/Fprintf calls. Kept runRecordStore field for wave.Runner use only. All engine and output tests pass with Output=nil (safe no-op).
data.title: Wire RunOutput into engine replacing callbacks

data.note: 2026-04-06 15:12 - Task [x51] complete. Replaced all 13 On* callback fields + direct runLog/runRecordStore usage in engine.go with single Output *output.RunOutput field. Key decisions: (1) Expanded RunLogSink interface from 7 to 22 methods to cover all engine logging needs (budget, signals, idle, agent events, context errors). (2) Kept runRecordStore field on Engine solely for wave.Runner construction — only Output routes EpicStatus updates now. (3) Removed SetRunLog/RunLog since runLog field is gone. (4) cmd/tk/cmd/run.go still references the removed On* fields — task [coh] must update run.go to construct RunOutput and set eng.Output instead. (5) ContextFailed vs ContextGenerationFailed: the old code had OnContextFailed for both generation failure and save failure, but runlog had separate LogContextGenerationFailed and LogContextSaveFailed. Added distinct ContextGenerationFailed and ContextSaveFailed methods on RunOutput to preserve this distinction.
data.title: Unified run output module

data.reason: Wired RunOutput into run.go and wrapup.go. run.go constructs RunOutput with terminal, board, and runlog sinks, passes it to engine and wrapup.Runner. Removed all eng.On* callback assignments (already deleted by x51). Replaced outputResult() with emitRunComplete() using output.RunComplete(). Replaced all fmt.Printf status output in wrapup.go with Output methods (WrapupStepResult, MergeSuccess, WorktreePreserved, WorktreeInfo, Warn, PRCreated). Added CloudInfo, MergeSuccess, PRCreated, WorktreeInfo methods to output.go. Removed JSONL field from wrapup.Runner (RunOutput handles JSONL suppression). Updated tests.
data.title: Wire RunOutput into run.go and wrapup.go replacing direct output

data.note: 2026-04-06 15:21 - Task [coh] complete. Wired RunOutput into run.go and wrapup.go. Key decisions: (1) RunOutput is constructed in runRun() after board/cloud setup but before engine start — outOpts accumulate sinks as they become available, then New(outOpts...) is called once. (2) Runlog sink is added after worktree creation since NewWithWorkDir needs workDir. (3) Removed JSONL field from wrapup.Runner — RunOutput handles JSONL suppression internally. (4) Added CloudInfo, MergeSuccess, PRCreated, WorktreeInfo methods to output.go. (5) WrapupStepResult now uses leading 2-space indent and routes errors to stderr. (6) The 'no ready epics' early-exit JSONL path in runRun() uses inline map since it fires before RunOutput construction. (7) Pre-existing test failure in internal/agent (TestAcpAgent_command/default_gemini_command) is unrelated.
data.title: Unified run output module

data.reason: Added debugf() helper method on Server that gates output behind devMode flag. Replaced all 25 [DEBUG] fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, ...) calls with s.debugf(...) calls. Non-debug stderr output (warnings, errors) left unchanged. Server is now silent on stderr by default; debug output only appears when --dev flag is set.
data.title: Remove board server DEBUG prints, use RunOutput for server lifecycle

data.note: 2026-04-06 15:25 - Task [jpw] complete. Added debugf(format, args...) method on Server struct that checks s.devMode before printing. Non-debug stderr output (file watcher errors, cloud push errors, shutdown messages, dev mode info) was intentionally left unchanged since those are legitimate warnings/lifecycle messages. The board server is now silent on stderr by default.

data.note: 2026-04-06 16:01 - Task u75 done: Added Group int (json:"group") to WrapupStep. Group 0 = sequential (zero-value default). decompositionPrompt now instructs agent to assign group numbers starting from 1. strictRetryPrompt updated to list group as required key. Two new tests added for group parsing. Note: BuildStepPrompt not yet updated to handle parallel group context (omitting same-group steps from checklist) — that's part of the task description for 4bm.
data.title: Wrapup per-step output and parallel step support

data.reason: Added Output *output.RunOutput field to WrapupRunner. Wired WrapupAgentStep() calls before (running) and after (status) each step, Warn() on retry attempts, and Warn() for saveProgress failures. Passed r.Output through to WrapupRunner in wrapup.go. Replaced fmt.Fprintf cache warning with Output.Warn(). Added two tests verifying output calls and retry warnings.
data.title: Wire per-step output into WrapupRunner

data.note: 2026-04-06 16:03 - Task 3iy done: WrapupRunner now has Output field, wired into step loop. Output calls are nil-guarded so existing callers without Output still work. Tests use output.New(WithStdout, WithStderr) with buffers to capture and assert output. The fmt.Fprintf fallback is kept when Output is nil for backwards compat in saveProgress warning.
data.title: Wrapup per-step output and parallel step support

data.reason: Refactored RunAgentSteps to group steps by Group field and execute parallel groups concurrently. Steps with same Group>0 launch N goroutines each with its own ACP session via SessionAgent.Open(). Group 0 steps run sequentially reusing a shared session. Non-SessionAgent falls back to sequential. Progress saved per-group. Added groupSteps helper, extracted runSingleStep method. Tests: parallel group, non-session fallback, mixed sequential+parallel.
data.title: Implement parallel step execution in WrapupRunner

data.note: 2026-04-06 16:06 - Task 4bm done: RunAgentSteps now groups steps by Group field using groupSteps() helper. Group 0 steps each form their own single-step group (sequential). Group N>0 steps run in parallel — each goroutine opens its own session via SessionAgent.Open(). Shared session is reused for sequential groups. Non-SessionAgent falls back to sequential for all groups. Progress saved per-group. Extracted runSingleStep() method for reuse between sequential and parallel paths. Three new tests: parallel group, non-session fallback, mixed sequential+parallel.
data.title: Wrapup per-step output and parallel step support
